name: Exascend Catalyst MicroSD SDXC 128 GB 175MBs V30 U3
description: Get maximum performance from compatible smartphones, tablets, cameras and other devices with the 128GB Catalyst UHS-I microSDXC Memory Card from Exascend. Designed for raw 4K video recording without dropping frames and burst photography, this 128GB memory card delivers maximum read speeds of 170 MB/s and write speeds of up to 150 MB/s.

features.Key Features: 128GB Storage Capacity | A2 / UHS-I / V30 / U3 | Max Sequential Read Speed: 170 MB/s | Max Sequential Write Speed: 150 MB/s | Min Sustained Write Speed: 30 MB/s | Resists Dust, Impacts, X-Rays & Magnets | Can Withstand Temperature Extremes
features.What’s In The Box: Exascend Catalyst MicroSD SDXC 128 GB 175MBs V30 U3
